title: Supervised Learning Quiz
description: Test your ML algorithms and model training knowledge.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a Random Forest and XGBoost?

options.text: Random Forest uses decision trees; XGBoost uses neural networks
Random Forest trains trees independently (bagging); XGBoost trains trees sequentially to correct previous errors (boosting)
XGBoost can only handle classification; Random Forest handles both
Random Forest is for regression; XGBoost is for classification

questions.question: What does L2 regularisation (Ridge) do to a linear model?

options.text: It removes features with zero importance
It penalises large weights, reducing model complexity and helping prevent overfitting
It forces the model to use all features equally

questions.question: What does cross-validation do in GridSearchCV?

options.text: It trains the model multiple times with different random seeds
It evaluates model performance on multiple held-out data splits to get a reliable estimate
It splits the dataset across multiple CPU cores
It validates that hyperparameters are within acceptable ranges
